summary:
The issue was a nil pointer dereference in `makeStatusHandler` when accessing `cfg.Metrics` (which is `nil` due to the optional `metrics` field not being present in `config.json`). I fixed it by adding a nil check before accessing the `Metrics` fields.

Rebuild the binary with `go build -o server main.go`, then run `./test.sh` to verify (it should pass without panic).
